metadata.name: Uptimekuma
metadata.description:
Uptimekuma is a self-hosted monitoring tool that allows you to keep track of the uptime and performance of your websites and services. It provides a user-friendly interface to monitor HTTP(s), TCP, ICMP (ping), and more, with customizable alerts and notifications.

Project: https://uptime.kuma.pet/
Documentation: https://docs.uptime.kuma.pet/
GitHub: https://github.com/louislam/uptime-kuma
metadata.author: Christian Lempa
